race.comment: PIMLICO (4) held in high regard by the stable and returns a gelding. Got off the mark at start four, then came to town with a battling fourth over 1200m at Rosehill Gardens in BM 68 class. Fitted with the two slick trials and gets the right set-up from the good gate. Hard to hold out. CALL ME SASSY (9) resumes. Lightly raced mare who created a big impression in her first prep. Sat on the good tempo from the outside draw with a courageous third over 1300m at Hawkesbury. Wasn't pushed out in the two trials and no shock to see her finish over the top of these. BALMAIN DARLING (7) has her hoof on the till fourth-up. Indicated a win was imminent when she loomed strongly to run third over 1200m at Wyong. Likely to go forward with the claim and figure prominently. RAJWA (2) winkers go on for this from the wide gate and drops a level today. Stalked the speed with an improved second over 1200m at Canterbury. Expected to take a hand in the finish.
